mapper.insert: insert into dining_point (name, address, contact_phone, operating_hours, status, image, grid_coverage, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) values (#{name}, #{address}, #{contactPhone}, #{operatingHours}, #{status}, #{image}, #{gridCoverage}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser})
mapper.select:
select * from dining_point
and name like concat('%',#{name},'%')
and status = #{status}
order by create_time desc
